how_verified: BY USE on the resident chat-4b (Qwen3.5-4B-AWQ @ :8000, confirmed resident via `company gpu`: ~8GB held, card not stomped). (1) DISCOVERY: RoleRegistry().discover(['roles']) shows judge_mining live; output_schema has EXACTLY the three spec'd fields ['grounded','unsupported','confidence']; mode_scope={'mining'}; input_addresses=('utterance',); op=generate; it is in the mining cast and NOT in the listening cast (listening untouched). (2) FLOOR: tests/cognition_governance_acceptance.py = 42/42 PASS — the source-invariant AST scan over roles/* (now incl. judge_mining.py) confirms it emits no resolve/approve/dispatch and launches no claude -p; it is pure-declarative. (3) ADVERSARIAL FIRE: run_role(judge_mining, {extract, raw_exchange}) where the extract FABRICATES a tim_correction (about feature branches) with zero basis in a raw exchange that was just a Q&A about GPU residency -> grounded:false, unsupported names the field precisely ('tim_correction: The raw exchange contains no correction from Tim; he asked a question and I answered it, but Tim did not correct my answer or mention feature branches.'), confidence 1.0. (4) FAITHFUL FIRE: an extract whose every non-empty field (decision/rationale/tim_correction/my_error/frustration/pattern_tag) is supported by its raw exchange (Tim: 'stop summarizing, give every detail') -> grounded:true, unsupported:'' , confidence 1.0 — NO spurious failure on the empty bug_fix/needs_tim fields (the vacuously-grounded empty-field rule held).
needs_tim: None blocking. FLAGGED honest limits (no green-paint): (a) E4 epistemic-monoculture caveat — judge_mining is a SINGLE-4B SOFT judgement (measures the model's variance, not independent error), same caveat as confirm_registration/verify_lens; the no-fiction GUARANTEE is not the model. The model_binding shape accepts a stronger-model/cloud bind (C2.5 / models_for_role) as an enhancement toward independent error when a GPU window permits — never a requirement. (b) roles/AGENTS.md is the drift home and is NOT yet updated to reflect judge_mining (file-disjoint: editing it was forbidden this lane; the next beat reflects new roles), so tests/roles_acceptance.py will RED on 'drift: [judge_mining]' until then — EXPECTED, not a defect (the floor test cognition_governance_acceptance.py is the one that must pass, and it does).
notes: MIRRORS roles/verify_lens.py exactly: a SINGLE-GENERATE validator (NOT a draws:N jury — deliberately distinct from confirm_registration.py/verify_jury.py, which are this composition's quorum-jury siblings). The pair rides in the unit (the axis-inversion, C 3/4): {extract, raw_exchange} placed at ctx['utterance'] by run_items/run_role, framed byte-identically; input_addresses stays the DEFAULT ('utterance',) so extract/raw_exchange are KEYS inside the unit, NOT declared inputs. NO draws / NO verdict_rule / NO evidence field — exactly the three spec'd output fields, tied (grounded:false => unsupported names the field; true => ''). Prompt posture biases toward FAIL (false-negative is the dangerous error for a no-fiction gate, mirroring verify_lens's adversarial-disprove default-to-fail) and explicitly EXEMPTS empty '' fields from being counted unsupported (the mine_exchange schema defaults most fields to '' — without this, every faithful extract would spuriously fail). The floor stays: advisory only, FLAG-never-drop (variance-not-error). FILE-DISJOINT honored: only roles/judge_mining.py written; no edits to mine_exchange (other lane), runtime/*, mcp_face/*, or roles/AGENTS.md. NOT committed (per lane instruction).
findings: This is the CONFIRM gate for ③ (the validator), so its 'findings' are the by-use proof that the no-fiction gate WORKS, not a transcript mining (that is the MINE lane). Proof: on a clear-cut fabrication (a tim_correction invented from nothing over a raw GPU-residency Q&A), the gate returned grounded:false and named the exact ungrounded field; on a genuinely-grounded extract (a real 'stop summarizing, give every detail' correction), it returned grounded:true with no spurious empty-field flags. The gate distinguishes fabricated from grounded on the resident 4B with confidence 1.0 on both — the no-fiction floor (COMPOSITIONS invariant 2) bites as designed for ③ before any extract is clustered/drafted into a feedback-*.md memory file.
